description_long: This bollard consists of a robust, dark metallic anvil mounted atop a tall, rectangular wooden post. The anvil features a classic horned design with a flat working surface and a pointed tip, typical of traditional blacksmith anvils. The wooden post is vertically oriented, with a visibly textured, weathered grain and reinforced by metal brackets or plates at the top edges. The overall construction suggests durability and a strong deterrent to vehicle passage, while the anvil adds a distinctive industrial or historical aesthetic. The metal components have a slightly glossy, worn finish, contrasting with the matte, rough wood. This object is likely intended as a decorative or thematic barrier in urban or park settings, evoking craftsmanship or heritage.
description: A tall, rectangular wooden post supports a dark metallic anvil with a horned, flat-topped design, reinforced by metal brackets. The bollard combines industrial and rustic aesthetics, appearing sturdy and visually striking.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the anvil's horn and the textured wooden post beneath.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the anvil's rectangular face and visible metal bracket on the wooden post.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the anvil's horn pointing in the opposite direction.
description_view_3: Rear end-on view, showing the back of the anvil and another metal bracket on the post.
